```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement multi-modal model integration (text+image+audio)"
---
# Multi-Modal Models
## Task
Integrate multi-modal models for text, image, and audio.
## Requirements
1. Process multiple input modalities. 2. Implement cross-modal attention.
3. Handle modality-specific preprocessing. 4. Fuse representations from different modalities.
5. Evaluate on multi-modal benchmarks.
## Constraints
- Handle missing modalities gracefully. Normalize representations across modalities.
## Success Criteria
- Multi-modal inputs processed correctly. Cross-modal understanding demonstrated.
```
